goal: 补齐 fork PR code commit transport

summary.title: 补齐 fork PR code object transport
summary.what: 在已实现的 fork actor-log accept 流程上，补齐 contributor 原始 code commit/tree object 的 transport：mainline actor import 会 best-effort fetch accepted sealed intents 引用的 fork branches 到 refs/mainline/imports/<actor>/branches/*，accept provenance 记录 imported_branch_refs 与 object_fetch_warnings，push accepted metadata 时同步这些 hidden import refs。
summary.why: 只把 contributor actor log 接进 upstream 还不够。fork PR 经过 squash 或 rebase merge 后，upstream main 不一定包含 contributor 的原始 code_commit object；没有这些对象，Pin 无法用 sealed event 的 code tree/commit 解释并 pin 到 upstream merge commit。需要让 upstream 显式接收作者 sealed intent 的同时，也接收相关 fork code objects，并清楚标记对象获取状态。
summary.user_goal: 补齐 fork PR code commit transport

decisions.point: fork PR 作者的 code objects 如何进入 upstream view
decisions.chose: actor import 从 fork remote best-effort fetch sealed intent 中记录的 GitBranch 到 refs/mainline/imports/<actor>/branches/*，让原始 commit/tree object 在 upstream 可达。
decisions.rationale: 隐藏 import refs 保留贡献者原始代码对象，不改变 upstream main 历史；Pin 可以在 squash/rebase merge 场景继续用 tree/content 匹配。
rejected: 只导入 actor log 而不导入 code objects，因为 squash/rebase merge 会让 sealed event 的 code_commit 在 upstream 不可达。
复制 fork git notes，因为 fork notes 不是 upstream main commit 的证据，upstream pin notes 应由 upstream pin/reconcile 逻辑写入。

decisions.point: fork branch 已删除或不可 fetch 时是否拒绝 actor log accept
decisions.chose: 不拒绝 author-sealed actor log；记录 object_fetch_warnings，并让需要对象的 auto-pin 留给后续手动 fetch 或 explicit pin。
decisions.rationale: actor-log trust decision 和 code-object availability 是两个状态。分支缺失不应抹掉作者 sealed metadata，但 UI/JSON 必须清楚显示对象 transport 不完整。

decisions.point: maintainer backfill 与 later accepted contributor intent 是否冲突
decisions.chose: 两者共存：maintainer backfill/explicit pin 是 upstream rescue record，accepted actor log 是 contributor 自己 author-sealed record；同一 merge commit 的 note 可以包含两个 intent refs。
decisions.rationale: coverage 保持 commit-level，review queue 不因已 pin 的 contributor intent 被错误污染。

decisions.point: Hub/external contribution fallback 与 author-sealed import 的边界
decisions.chose: 保留 GitHub external_contributions 作为没有 upstream-visible actor log 时的 fallback；真实 actor import 的 provenance 使用 accepted_actor_log、author_sealed=true、verified=true，并携带 imported code refs/warnings。
decisions.rationale: Hub 只是展示层，不能把 GitHub PR body 或 inferred metadata 冒充成作者 sealed intent。

rejected.alternative: 把 GitHub PR body 里的空 ## Mainline Intent 当作 contributor intent 来源
rejected.reason: PR body 是 review-time artifact，且空模板明确不是 Mainline sealed record；导入时只能作为 github_pr_imported/inferred fallback，并标注 not_author_sealed。

review_notes: 本 intent 是 stacked branch 上的补齐层，建立在 int_c9ea08de 的 actor-log accept 和 int_8fe54292 的 Hub fallback 展示之上；本层新增的核心行为是 fork branch/code object transport。

验证覆盖：fork PR 已有 maintainer backfill、contributor 无 actor log 的 external fallback、accepted actor log provenance、squash merge code object fetch、fork branch 缺失 warning、hidden import branch refs push、actor count/review queue/coverage 不污染。

已运行：go test ./internal/engine -run 'TestImportActorLog|TestImportedBranchRef|TestReconcile|TestPin|TestBackfill|TestCoverage|TestPRDescription|TestPRComment' -count=1；go test ./internal/hub -count=1；go test ./internal/cli -count=1；go run . actor import --help；git diff --check。

architectural_claims: Fork contributor intent transport is an explicit upstream maintainer accept path, not normal blind sync of arbitrary fork refs.
Actor-log acceptance and fork code-object reachability are separate provenance facts projected into IntentView and Hub JSON.
Imported fork branch refs live under refs/mainline/imports/<actor>/branches/* and keep contributor commits reachable without modifying upstream main history.
behavioral_changes: mainline actor import fetches accepted actor logs and best-effort fetches sealed intent branches from the fork remote.
Imported fork branch refs are pushed to the configured upstream remote alongside accepted actor refs, acceptance events, and new pin notes.
Branch fetch failures produce object_fetch_warnings instead of rejecting the accepted author-sealed actor log.
Accepted actor-log provenance in Hub/model JSON includes imported_branch_refs and object_fetch_warnings.

data_model_changes.name: ActorLogAcceptedEvent.imported_branch_refs
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Older accept events omit the field and continue to deserialize with nil slices.

data_model_changes.name: ActorLogAcceptedEvent.object_fetch_warnings
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Older accept events omit the field and continue to deserialize with nil slices.

data_model_changes.name: refs/mainline/imports/<actor>/branches/*
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Only created by explicit actor import from a fork remote.

security_implications: Fork actor logs remain behind an explicit maintainer accept command; imported metadata is not treated as normal trusted upstream sync until accepted.
Fork branch object fetch is best-effort and provenance is displayed; branch objects are made reachable but fork notes are not copied as upstream evidence.
Imported branch ref names are sanitized and validated with git check-ref-format before use.
migration_notes: No migration required. Existing actor_log.accepted events and Hub exports continue to work without the new provenance fields.
